body.raw: {"content":"Wrapped up event-storming for Checkout and Catalog contexts. Ready for review @Aditya @Neha"}
{"content":"Schema registry prototype is running; aligned sources for orders and payments. Thoughts @Aditya?"}
{"content":"JWT propagation between services verified in dev; pending keys rotation guidelines. @Aditya please confirm."}
{"content":"SBOM is generated on CI and pushed to the repo for all microservices. Thanks @Vivek for the pipeline help!"}
{"content":"Blue/green cutover plan drafted; traffic shifting will start after perf baseline. @Aditya @Priya heads-up."}
{"content":"Saga POC demonstrates compensation on partial failures. Will extend for inventory reservations. @Aditya please review."}
{"content":"Service discovery via Consul and centralized config via Vault templates is working in dev. @Aditya quick check?"}
{"content":"Adjusted SLOs after the first cutover; new error budget policy shared. @Aditya @Neha please review doc."}
{"content":"Post-go-live dashboards and RCA template are ready. Early incident playbook attached. @Aditya thoughts?"}
{"content":"Base image refreshed with JDK 21 and latest CVE patches. Triggering rebuilds tonight. @Aditya @Vivek FYI."}
{"content":"OTel tracing and logs wired for payments and orders; latency SLO panels added. @Aditya please check."}
{"content":"CDC outbox pattern tested against payment state changes; retries look stable. @Aditya we can demo tomorrow."}
{"content":"Ran rollback simulation for auth service; checklists updated. @Aditya @Rahul please review the runbook."}
{"content":"Mapped skills matrix for DEV roles; shared draft with L&D. Inputs welcome @Rohan @Ananya."}
{"content":"OpenAPI contracts drafted for customer and payments; versioning strategy documented. @Aditya please review."}
{"content":"Cache and matrix build speeds improved CI by ~35%. Will share numbers in tomorrow’s standup. @Aditya @Rahul"}
{"content":"Read model strategy drafted for order lookups; cache invalidation rules defined. @Aditya any concerns?"}
{"content":"Canary rules configured with error-rate guardrails; rollback threshold 2%. @Aditya please confirm policy."}
{"content":"Latency impact for tokenization looks within SLA. Posting detailed numbers shortly. @Shreya @Kavya FYI."}
{"content":"Benchmarked Playwright vs Cypress; Playwright wins on stability and flake rate. @Kavya we can proceed?"}
{"content":"Sharding enabled; dashboards now show pass rate by shard. Sharing Grafana links. @Kavya @Meera please review."}
{"content":"Axe-core checks added; CI failing on critical a11y issues as expected. @Kavya great progress here."}
{"content":"Replaced brittle locators with data-testids across top 20 flows. Flake rate is dropping. @Kavya @Suresh"}
{"content":"Parallel test data seeding implemented; no more collisions in CI. Kudos @Tanvi for the seed helpers."}
{"content":"CI gate now blocks on AA violations; initial rollout clean on portal app. @Kavya @Arjun great work team."}
{"content":"JMeter scenarios finalized; baseline SLAs documented in Confluence. @Kavya please approve for prod run."}
{"content":"Top 10 smoke scenarios identified per product; exit criteria aligned with release gates. @Kavya @Meera take a look."}
{"content":"Reusable pipelines created with approvals and artifact promotions. @Aditya this improves lead time notably."}
{"content":"Failure artifacts (screenshots/video/trace) are uploading; debugging is much faster now. @Kavya @Arjun thanks!"}
{"content":"Quarantine workflow live; JIRA tickets created automatically for flaky tests. @Kavya it’s paying off already."}
{"content":"Prioritization tuned to run riskier specs first; feedback cycle is shorter on PRs. @Kavya @Suresh please check stats."}
{"content":"Baseline screenshots captured for primary UIs; tolerance set to 0.2%. @Kavya this is ready for rollout."}
{"content":"Reserved/SP + spot mix drafted; we can cut compute costs without SLA risk. @Shreya @Manish thoughts?"}
{"content":"Tiered pricing scenarios validated with rating pipeline fixtures. Ready for finance review. @Shreya @Tarun"}
{"content":"Reference repos published for node, java, and python stacks; bots set to keep them updated. @Aditya great base!"}
{"content":"3DS challenge flow tested for exemptions; UX looks smooth on fallback. @Shreya please sign off for pilot."}
{"content":"Fixtures library now provides deterministic data; flake due to test data reduced. @Kavya @Arjun thumbs up?"}
{"content":"Consolidated duplicate specs and stabilized timeouts; nightly pass rate improved. @Kavya @Meera please verify."}
{"content":"Hourly synthetic journeys live; alerts tuned to reduce noise. Dashboard link shared. @Kavya feedback welcome."}
{"content":"Cost allocation tags enforced; first showback report sent to owners. @Shreya @Devika this should drive accountability."}
{"content":"Pre-commit hooks added across repos; style and security checks enforced. Thanks @Arjun for quick reviews. @Kavya"}
{"content":"Refund and chargeback flows documented with fault tolerance; test cases attached. @Shreya please confirm scope."}
{"content":"Certification prep materials curated; voucher process published for teams. @Rohan @Ananya please circulate."}
{"content":"License usage analyzed; consolidation proposal drafted to cut redundant seats. @Shreya @Manish feedback?"}
{"content":"MFA rollout plan finalized; device posture checks enabled for priority apps. @Alok go-live plan attached."}
{"content":"Shortlisted campuses and shared brochures; outreach calendar ready. @Rohan please approve slots."}
{"content":"Online test vendor onboarded; pilot with 200 candidates scheduled. @Rohan @Kiran volunteers confirmed."}
{"content":"Offer letter templates finalized; approval workflow tested with HRBP. @Rohan please review final copy."}
{"content":"Onboarding schedule published; IT provisioning requests will auto-trigger on acceptance. @Rohan heads-up."}
{"content":"Offer acceptance tracker live; risk flags added for potential drop-offs. @Rohan @Ishita please monitor."}
{"content":"Day-1 flow refined; feedback form added for continuous improvements. @Rohan @Kiran please share any gaps."}
{"content":"Q2 engagement survey questionnaire drafted; comms plan prepared. @Rohan launch window proposal attached."}
{"content":"Standard devcontainer templates published for node/java/py. @Aditya developers can adopt right away."}
{"content":"CI now gates on HIGH+ vulnerabilities; auto-remediation tickets are created. @Kavya @Shreya alignment done."}
{"content":"Interview panels trained; rubric calibration complete. Auto-scheduling looks good. @Rohan we’re ready."}
{"content":"Buddy allocation finalized; mandatory training auto-enrollment configured. @Rohan thanks @Ishita for inputs."}
{"content":"Pre-joining FAQs updated; weekly touchpoints scheduled with offers in pipeline. @Rohan please share any additions."}
{"content":"Decks and alumni connects prepared for campus talks; TL session outline attached. @Rohan feedback welcome."}
{"content":"BG check flow tested; KYC and education proofs are being captured reliably. @Rohan ready to scale."}
{"content":"Attendance sync integrated; reconciliation shows zero drift in test batch. @Shreya this is ready for UAT."}
{"content":"Variance deep-dive drafted; business line commentary added. @Shreya @Manish please review highlights."}
{"content":"Accrual entries posted; control accounts reconcile for key balances. @Shreya audit pack attached for review."}
{"content":"Rightsizing recommendations prepared for compute and storage; expected savings noted. @Shreya @Devika see sheet."}
{"content":"PCI gap analysis complete; tokenization reduces scope significantly. @Shreya next steps in sheet."}
{"content":"Data transfer costs analyzed; CDN and peering adjustments proposed. @Shreya @Manish please review."}
{"content":"Idempotency and reconciliation checks validated on retries; no duplicate settlements observed. @Shreya good to go."}
{"content":"Idle resource cleanup list prepared; decommission plan attached for review. @Shreya @Devika please confirm windows."}
{"content":"Monthly KPI dashboard draft ready: cost per product and environment. @Shreya please review visuals and metrics."}
{"content":"Patch baseline scheduled fleet-wide; windows documented per environment. @Alok please confirm cadence."}
{"content":"Compliance dashboard is online; alerts wired for posture deviations. @Alok @Bharath please subscribe to alerts."}
{"content":"Secrets rotation SOP drafted; integrated with Vault/PKI. @Alok can we lock rotation cadence monthly?"}
{"content":"Vulnerability scans scheduled; dedupe and auto-routing to owners verified. @Alok @Ranajit visibility looks good."}
{"content":"Patch runbooks updated; rollback tests pass in lower environments. @Alok sign-off requested for prod pilot."}
{"content":"Micro-segmentation policies drafted; zero-trust defaults applied to east-west traffic. @Alok review please."}
{"content":"CIS Level-1 hardening applied on baseline AMIs; verification scans are clean. @Alok moving to fleets next."}
{"content":"Hardened base images built; drift control checks in CI are green. @Alok nice progress across images."}
{"content":"WAF rules tuned; bot challenges and rate limits configured for high-risk paths. @Alok request review slot."}
